creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tijl
Date: Thu Mar 17 13:05:54 UTC 2016
New revision: 411280
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/411280

Log:
  Mark Nessus ports deprecated.  Nessus became proprietary closed-source
  software many years ago and the ports are now outdated.  A good alternative
  is OpenVAS which started as a fork of the open-source Nessus.

  PR:		208023
  Approved by:	Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/security/nessus/Makefile
  head/security/nessus-libnasl/Makefile
  head/security/nessus-libraries/Makefile
  head/security/nessus-plugins/Makefile
